title: PunishGui
description: A  simpler way to Punish Players
body:
![PunishGUI Title](https://i.imgur.com/xNCtxC2.png)
![Red Bar](https://i.imgur.com/MyOfqwq.png)
![Previews](https://i.imgur.com/xAAcYOW.png)
Main Menu
![Image of Main Menu displaying contents](https://i.imgur.com/tCWYKAc.png)
History Menu (Currently LiteBans Only)
![Image of the History Menu](https://i.imgur.com/vMtkt97.png)
Punishments Menu
![Image of the Punishments Menu](https://i.imgur.com/RHw9w2i.png)
![Commands Image](https://i.imgur.com/ESXPpWy.png)
/punish <player> - Opens Main Menu
/phistory <player> - Opens History Menu
![Permissions Image](https://i.imgur.com/6cXzump.png)
punishgui.punish
punishgui.history

![Apex Hosting Seperator](https://i.imgur.com/XGhG5r7.png)

PunishGui is proudly Sponsored by Apex Hosting
